hooks.command: PATH="$PATH:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin"; d=$(jq -r '.cwd // empty'); terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -subtitle "${d##*/}" -message 'Claude task is done' -sound Glass -activate "${__CFBundleIdentifier:-com.apple.Terminal}" 2>/dev/null || true

PATH="$PATH:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin"; t=$(jq -r '.tool_name // "a tool"'); terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code — needs permission' -message "Waiting for your approval: $t" -sound Ping -activate "${__CFBundleIdentifier:-com.apple.Terminal}" 2>/dev/null || true

PATH="$PATH:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin"; m=$(jq -r '.message // "Claude needs your attention"'); terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code — waiting' -message "$m" -sound Ping -activate "${__CFBundleIdentifier:-com.apple.Terminal}" 2>/dev/null || true
